entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher, you're clear of the perimeter. Stay sharp.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Fortress in sight. Target those firewall nodes.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher... this corridor. This is where we lost Wraith's signal.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Massive construct ahead. That's the Gatekeeper.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher... you actually did it. First breach confirmed.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Hostile contact across the board. They've adapted — stay aggressive.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Larger fortress. Denser defenses. Hit the nodes fast.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Tighter corridors. Faster data streams. Are you sure about this?

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Contact — massive construct. That's The Avenger. It's fast, Cipher.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Two down. One to go. I... I didn't think we'd get this far.
